## [15:20 - 18:25]

If you want to play the game or download the toolbar or anything, get site access, then you have to agree to this value trade. We give you the value, you get some pop-ups. Any time you want to stop the value trade, you stop it. Not a big deal. Like I said, it's software driven. What happens is when the user downloads the game, there's an adware inside that game and that adware looks at where you visit and what you search. When you visit something that is being targeted or you search for a keyword that is actually being targeted, that's when the pop-ups come up. You might say to yourself, hey, I got a pop-up blocker, that's not going to work. Pop-up blockers do not work with PPV because of the way that they're actually driven. The only thing they can do is turn off the software or the thing that made them agree in the first place.
